positive: A mystical celestial forest scene, featuring towering, bioluminescent fantasy trees with smooth, curved silhouettes, interwoven with glowing crystalline vines and soft mist. The color palette should be deep indigo, sapphire blue, and emerald green, contrasting against stark, ethereal white light sources. Focus on strong symmetry and negative space around the central glowing grove. High contrast, clean vector lines mixed with painterly gradients, perfect for screen printing on fabric, clean outlines, minimalist yet detailed, centered composition, volumetric lighting.
negative: text, logo, watermark, artifact, jpeg artifacts, grainy, blur, noise, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, mutated, blurry lines, excessive detail, over-rendered
